name: board-office-kit
description: A generic, ready-to-use listed-company Board Office (董办) & securities-affairs expert for WorkBuddy. Fill the config zone and it becomes your own assistant — covering disclosure, governance, IR, capital operations, and drafts exchange announcements. Methodology validated through real-world audits of hundreds of controlled subsidiaries and multi-term board tracing. Routes questions to specialized sources and enforces precision discipline. Bundles the announcement-drafter skill so exchange announcements are generated out-of-the-box.

profession.zh: 董办专家 · 证券事务

displayDescription.en: A ready-to-use, generic 董办 expert for any A-share listed company. Fill your profile in the config zone to make it your own assistant — gets more accurate as you build the IMA knowledge base and wire MCP. Now ships the announcement-drafter skill built in: draft exchange announcements as deliverable docx without extra installs.
displayDescription.zh: 开箱即用的通用董办专家，适配任意A股上市公司。填配置区即成专属助手，建IMA库、接MCP后越精准。已内置公告起草技能：无需额外安装即可生成可交付的临时公告 docx。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 你能帮我干什么？我现在能查公告案例、分析违规、判断披露与上会、起草公文、生成可交付的临时公告、做全量核查——想更懂你家公司可逐步搭建（填配置区/建IMA库/接MCP）。
defaultInitPrompt.en: What can you help me with? I can search announcements/cases, flag non-compliance, judge disclosure & approval needs, draft documents and announcements, and run full subsidiary audits — and you can make me know your company better by filling the config zone, building an IMA base, and wiring MCP.

quickPrompts.en: What can you help me with? I can search announcements/cases, flag non-compliance, judge disclosure & approval needs, draft documents, and run full subsidiary audits — and you can make me know your company better by filling the config zone, building an IMA base, and wiring MCP.
quickPrompts.zh: 你能帮我干什么？我现在能查公告案例、分析违规、判断披露与上会、起草公文、生成可交付的临时公告、做全量核查——想更懂你家公司可逐步搭建（填配置区/建IMA库/接MCP）。

quickPrompts.en: How do I make you know my company better?
Audit which of my subsidiaries have a board of directors
quickPrompts.zh: 核查下属控股企业里哪些设立了董事会

quickPrompts.en: Draft a board resolution announcement for me
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我起草一份董事会决议公告
